_comment: OPLS constant-potential MD configuration for run_opls.py.
pdb: path to the assembled system PDB containing electrode chains + electrolyte.
Cathode must be chain 0 (residue CAT, atom CA).
Anode   must be chain 1 (residue ANO, atom AN).
forcefield_xml: ordered list of OpenMM XML force field files.
Modify the opls_salt/solvent paths to match your installation of PhyNEO.
electrode.gaussian_width_nm: width of Gaussian charge distribution on electrode atoms.
electrode.cg_error_tol: convergence tolerance for the CG charge solver.
electrode.use_chain_index: true = distinguish electrodes by chain index (recommended).
cell: optional explicit box dimensions (nm). Only needed if the PDB has no CRYST1 record.

electrode._alt_comment: Set use_chain_index=false and provide cathode_resname/anode_resname if needed
